message:
fix(fwc): remove fabricated empty pools from unknown rate-limits resource

Remove "pools": [] from the rate-limits resource response when state is
unknown. Add test asserting pools key is absent when no live telemetry
is available, preventing agents from confusing "no data" with "no pools."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
